comments.body: Blocking: usleep() with a full doubling backoff (up to ~800ms) runs synchronously inside the request cycle. If this dispatcher is called from a queued job that's fine, but if it can be called from a web request this will hold the HTTP worker. Confirm call sites before merge.
comments.author: reviewer-bot

comments.body: Blocking: assertRetried()/assertNotRetried() are not real PHPUnit/Pest assertions in this fixture's patch — the acceptance criteria requires a test that actually covers both paths, not placeholder assertion calls.
comments.author: reviewer-bot

comments.body: Non-blocking: consider naming the retry count constant instead of the literal 3.
comments.author: reviewer-bot
